name: @your-org/example-dev
description: Docker compose setup for dev environment

scripts.dev: saf-git-hashes && saf-docker generate && docker build -f ../../example/clients/root/Dockerfile -t your-org-example-static-root:latest ../.. && docker compose --env-file env.dev --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yaml up --build
scripts.up: saf-git-hashes && saf-docker generate && docker build -f ../../example/clients/root/Dockerfile -t your-org-example-static-root:latest ../.. && docker compose --env-file env.dev --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yaml up --build --detach
scripts.down: saf-docker generate && docker compose --env-file env.dev --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yaml down
